reasoning: The idea that Dr. Anthony Fauci will be extradited to Russia is a completely baseless internet rumor that went viral on social media in January 2025. Numerous fact-checkers, including Snopes and legal experts, have debunked the claim, noting that the U.S. does not even have an extradition treaty with Russia and there is no legal mechanism to extradite a U.S. citizen to Russia under these circumstances. Extradition requires a formal legal process, and with the deadline being just a few weeks away (March 31, 2025), it is practically and legally impossible for this to occur. The Polymarket price reflecting a ~1% probability aligns with the fact that this is essentially a 'meme' question tracking a resolved disinformation narrative, making the true probability effectively zero.
